xref_details.note: Confirmed: PHASE_B2_PROJECT_STRUCTURE.md has no rpc/ directory. XREF correctly documents addition.
Partially accurate: B2 has data/ as env var paths (L866-867: SQLITE_DB_PATH=./data/, CHROMA_PERSIST_DIR=./data/chroma) but not as explicit top-level directory in tree. XREF is essentially correct.

xref_details.claim: PHASE_B2 정본은 33개 모델 정의. V0에서 25개 우선 구현
xref_details.note: B2 defines full model set. PART2 V0 table lists 25 schemas + 5 registries consistent with scoping.
B4 CONFIG_SPEC has 17 sections. PART2 V0 config shows 13 active sections, excluding [blue_nodes],[ui],[rate_limit],[guardrails]. Consistent.

xref_details.claim: PHASE_B6 정본은 ci.yml 단일 통합 워크플로우. PART2는 가독성을 위해 역할별 분리 표기
xref_details.note: PHASE_B6 defines single ci.yml. PART2 splits into role-based display for readability. XREF correctly documents divergence.

xref_details.claim: AI_INVESTING_SPEC §14 원본은 인프라/도구 14개 항목. PART2에서 기능 카테고리별로 재구성
xref_details.note: PART2 acknowledges reorganization. Phase2 F-105 also confirmed this discrepancy.

xref_details.claim: SDAR_SPEC §7 원본은 S0~S6 정의(6+1). ESCALATED는 종료 상태
xref_details.note: SDAR_SPEC defines 7 states. PART2 correctly annotates the ESCALATED state semantics.

VAMOS_SDAR_DESIGN_SPECIFICATION.md — referenced at L2889, L3201, L3262, L3457, L3503, L3541, L3652, L4388, L4513
VAMOS_V0_READINESS_FINAL_REVIEW.md — no direct PART2 reference found
sot_coverage.note: READINESS_REVIEW and SDAR_DESIGN_SPECIFICATION are referenced by full name in PART2. Only V0_READINESS_FINAL_REVIEW has zero PART2 mentions.

sot_to_part2.step7_guides_coverage: 16/16 referenced as category via STEP7 keyword (100%)
sot_to_part2.note: Only VAMOS_V0_READINESS_FINAL_REVIEW.md lacks any PART2 cross-reference. It is a review artifact, not a design SOT.

part2_to_code.method: PHASE_B2 project structure defines code locations
part2_to_code.part2_sections_with_b2_path: V0(6 STEPs) + V1(4 Phases) + V2(4 Phases) + V3(4 Phases) + §6(11 cross-cut sections)
gaps: §6.10 Cloud Library — B2 has no explicit cloud_library/ directory (V2+ feature)
§6.9 SDAR — B2 has no explicit sdar/ directory (noted in Phase2 F-13)
§6.8 AI Investing — B2 has no explicit ai_investing/ directory
part2_to_code.note: These are V2/V3 features whose code paths are not yet defined in PHASE_B2. PART2 references the SOT specs directly for code structure guidance.

findings.description: VAMOS_V0_READINESS_FINAL_REVIEW.md is the only SOT file (1/68) with zero PART2 cross-references. As a review/audit artifact rather than a design SOT, this is acceptable but should be noted.
findings.recommendation: No action required — review artifacts do not require PART2 implementation mapping.

findings.description: Three V2/V3 specialized module directories (cloud_library/, sdar/, ai_investing/) are referenced in PART2 §6.8-6.10 but have no corresponding B2 project structure definition.
findings.recommendation: When B2 is updated for V2/V3 scoping, add these directory structures. Currently acceptable as V0/V1 focused.

findings.description: XREF-V0-10 claims 'PHASE_B2 정본에는 명시적 data/ 미포함' but B2 actually defines data paths via env vars (L866-867: SQLITE_DB_PATH=./data/, CHROMA_PERSIST_DIR=./data/chroma). The XREF is slightly imprecise — B2 implies data/ exists but does not list it in the directory tree.
findings.recommendation: Refine XREF-V0-10 wording to 'B2 정본 디렉토리 트리에 data/ 미명시 (env var 경로로만 암시)'.

findings.description: PART2 contains 771 SOT cross-references across 6313 lines (1 ref per 8.2 lines avg). Design docs (D2.0) dominate at 329 refs (42.7%), followed by build specs (PHASE_B) at 169 (21.9%), and schema docs (D2.1) at 102 (13.2%). This distribution correctly reflects PART2's role as implementation bridge.
findings.recommendation: No action — reference distribution is appropriate.

findings.description: PART2 contains 29 SOURCE_CONFLICT annotations, indicating proactive conflict documentation. All reviewed annotations correctly identify genuine conflicts between SOT files (e.g., B4 vs D2.0-06 TTL values).
findings.recommendation: SOURCE_CONFLICT annotations are a good practice. Continue maintaining them as SOT evolves.

findings.description: 16 STEP7 work guides (STEP7-B through STEP7-P) and 8 STEP7 review files are referenced in PART2 only by the generic 'STEP7' keyword (6 mentions total), not by individual file identifiers. These contain V2/V3 enhancement specifications that PART2 should eventually map more precisely.
findings.recommendation: Future PART2 V2/V3 sections should explicitly reference relevant STEP7 guide files for traceability.
